Who I am

Analyst. Consultant.
Builder.

I'm a financial analyst with hands-on experience in corporate finance, financial reporting, budgeting, and KPI dashboard design — built across real business environments in the geotechnical and construction sectors.

My edge: I combine rigorous financial foundations with AI-forward tools. Completed a 104-hour program in AI Applied to Financial Analysis at Tecnológico de Monterrey, and internationally trained through two programs at IEB Madrid.

Location
Guadalajara, Jalisco, México
Degree
B.S. Financial Administration — ITESO
Languages
Spanish Native · English B2 IELTS
Specialty
AI-Enhanced Financial Analysis

Graduation Ceremony · IEB Madrid 2024

Where I've worked

Professional
Experience

Nov 2025 – Present
Grupo Sandstorm GAM
Financial Analyst
  • Design and maintain KPI dashboards and financial reporting structures tracking profitability, cash flow, and project-level cost performance.
  • Lead the annual budgeting cycle and monthly financial close, including variance analysis against budget and prior periods.
  • Build financial tools that translate complex operational data into clear, actionable summaries for non-financial decision-makers.
Jan – Oct 2025
Trudeal Asesores
Independent Financial Consultant
  • Delivered financial analysis and decision-support tools to real business advisory engagements.
  • Conducted financial diagnostics and structured KPIs to improve management visibility in client companies.
Sep – Dec 2024
ITESO — PAP Program
Financial Consultant — THP
  • Led the full financial consulting workstream for THP, a manufacturing SME, designing a custom Financial Balanced Scorecard in Excel.
  • Identified COGS at 97% of revenue in 2022 and modeled a pricing strategy projecting recovery to positive net income margin by 2025.

What I've built

Selected
Projects

Financial Dashboard · 2024

Financial Balanced Scorecard — THP

Custom CMI in Excel for a manufacturing SME. 3-year financial analysis, income statements, break-even modeling, KPI tracking, and multi-year projections with adjusted pricing scenarios. Data shown is illustrative.

ExcelFinancial AnalysisKPI DashboardBreak-EvenProjections
Final presentation delivered to THP management team · ITESO PAP 2024
All figures and data shown in this dashboard are entirely fictitious and used for visual demonstration purposes only. They do not represent actual financial results of THP or any real entity.

KPI Dashboard · 2025–Present

Financial Reporting Dashboard — Sandstorm GAM

Operational financial dashboard tracking project-level KPIs, budget execution, billing milestones, and executive P&L summaries for a geotechnical construction firm. Financial data is illustrative.

HTML/CSSKPI TrackingBudget AnalysisData VisualizationExecutive Reporting
Live Preview — Control de Avance de Obra
Escenario ilustrativo · Datos confidenciales ocultos HTML / CSS Excel + SQL
Vista general — Grid de KPIs y métricas clave Análisis ejecutivo — Desglose en 4 columnas Heatmap de distribución de pilas por posición Desglose económico por cluster Resumen financiero — Cobranza y presupuesto

Investment Analysis · 2023

Portfolio Management — IEB Madrid / BlackRock

Comprehensive investment portfolio analysis developed as the final deliverable of the IEB Madrid Specialization. Presented to BlackRock-affiliated professionals. Covers equities, ETFs, REITs, bonds, fundamental & technical analysis, and portfolio construction.

Portfolio ManagementSecurities AnalysisEquities & ETFsREITsFixed Income
